message:
feat: add rich Ink event components and improve string renderer

Create event-components.tsx with specialized Ink components for each
event type: ToolStartLine, ToolEndLine, AssistantTextLine,
DelegationStartLine/EndLine, SystemLine, ThinkingLine. Each uses
appropriate colors, icons, and formatting.

Enhance render-event.ts with smartArgs (smart tool argument display),
formatDuration, and updated icons (diamond, triangle, check/cross).
The string renderer now uses the same visual language as the component
renderer, keeping CLI one-shot mode consistent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
